title: LP fee collection bypasses locker unlock gating
reason: Lower-impact variant of existing F-022; the core missing-gate issue on LP paths is already captured.

title: Pumponomics swap executes with zero minimum output leading to sandwich attack
Unchecked uint256-to-uint128 casts can silently corrupt unit accounting
reason: Requires unrealistic magnitudes or trusted signer/admin misuse; no realistic external exploit path was established.

title: Factory allows zero-address locker owner, creating irrecoverable approved lockers
reason: Creates a self-inflicted unusable locker/sink but does not provide a realistic cross-user or protocol-level exploit.

title: uint16 `fontaineCount` can overflow and disable future vest unlock creation
reason: Requires 65,535 vest unlock creations by the same owner and only self-DoSes vest unlock creation; practical risk is negligible.

title: emergencyWithdraw allows owner to drain all tokens including protocol funds
reason: Owner-privileged emergency path to treasury; trust/governance risk already contextually covered by F-026 residue-sweep behavior.

title: Vesting factory admin can frontrun recipient vesting creation
reason: `createSupVestingContract` is `onlyAdmin`; admin is already the authorized creator, so this is not a distinct frontrun vulnerability.

title: No slippage protection on Uniswap V3 position creation
SupVestingFactory allows setting any admin without timelock
reason: Governance policy/design choice, not a contract vulnerability by itself.

title: Active program funding can be interrupted by treasury flow rate changes
reason: Primarily expected behavior under treasury-side flow changes/insolvency; specific unintended clamp edge case is already captured in F-017.

title: Tax allocation can be updated while tax is being distributed
reason: Owner-authorized economic parameter update; no concrete unintended state corruption or bypass shown.

title: LP pool units not updated when liquidity is fully removed
reason: Incorrect: `_decreasePosition` decrements `_liquidityBalance` and updates LP units; remaining connection with zero units does not accrue rewards.
